rule.description: Zeek: file $(file_name) possible malware, source ip $(source_ip), destination ip $(destination_ip), destination port $(destination_port), mime type $(mime_type), total bytes $(total_bytes), sha1 $(sha1), sha256 $(sha256), note $(note).
Zeek: Possible Reverse shell (live). uid: $(uid), source ip: $(source_ip), destination ip: $(destination_ip), destination port: $(destination_port), payload type: $(payload_type).

Zeek: Possible Reverse shell (closed). uid: $(uid), source ip: $(source_ip), destination ip: $(destination_ip), destination port: $(destination_port), payload type: $(payload_type), duration: $(duration), origin bytes: $(origin_bytes), response bytes: $(response_bytes).

Zeek: Possible Reverse shell (traffic). uid: $(uid), source ip: $(source_ip), destination ip: $(destination_ip), destination port: $(destination_port), payload type: $(payload_type), duration: $(duration), origin bytes: $(origin_bytes), response bytes: $(response_bytes), origin packets: $(origin_packets), responsepackets: $(response_packets).
